overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character traversing the historic streets of Saint Denis. The sequence begins with walking past gas-lit brick buildings, transitions to horseback riding through cobblestone streets, and concludes with elevated rooftop traversal and descent into a covered market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with gas lamps and brick warehouses

events.description: rider on pale horse passes by from left to right in the foreground
character mounts a horse and transitions from walking to riding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy cobblestone street, passing wooden sidewalks and brick buildings

notable_agents.action: rider on pale horse trots past from left to right, moving opposite to camera direction

entered.detail: brick warehouse building with large GBL lettering on the upper facade
cast iron street lamps with warm yellow glow illuminating the street
two-story historic brick buildings with wooden balconies and shutters
painted sign on brick wall reading NO ENTRY near arched doorway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow historic street at night, illuminated by warm gas lamps. A rider on a pale horse passes by in the opposite direction. The street is lined with brick warehouses including one with a prominent GBL sign, and the ground is muddy cobblestone.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town street with tram tracks and commercial buildings

events.description: character dismounts horse and climbs up to an elevated balcony

agents.ego_description: riding a horse down the cobblestone street at a steady trot, passing under gas lamps

entered.detail: tall brick building with large painted signage reading SCHIFF on the wall
metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street running down the center

segments.scene_description: Now on horseback, the character rides down a wider cobblestone street with visible tram tracks. The SCHIFF building becomes prominent on the right side. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow view from behind the horse as it moves through the gas-lit streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony and rooftop walkway overlooking street market

events.description: character climbs up to building balcony gaining elevated vantage point over the street

agents.ego_description: traversing an elevated wooden balcony, moving along the building facade overlooking the street below

entered.detail: large painted wall sign reading SAINT DENIS MARKET with decorative lettering
overhead decorative lights spanning across the street between buildings
covered vendor stalls visible on the street below with various goods
wrought iron railings along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The character has climbed to an elevated balcony level, providing an overhead view of the street. The SAINT DENIS MARKET sign becomes visible on the building wall, and decorative string lights span overhead. The camera moves along the wooden balcony, passing the SCHIFF building at close range.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with fabric and textile stalls

events.description: descends stone staircase from balcony into the covered market area

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs into the market area, then exploring the narrow alley between stalls

entered.detail: wooden stalls with folded fabrics, textiles, and clothing items displayed
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the left wall
stone steps leading down from the balcony to the market floor

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the balcony into the Saint Denis Market via stone stairs. The scene shifts to a narrow covered alley with market stalls displaying fabrics and textiles. Wooden barrels line the left wall, and the warm glow of gas lamps illuminates the enclosed market space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the nighttime streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from a grounded walk through industrial alleys to an elevated perspective before descending into a covered marketplace. It begins with a walk down a narrow, muddy cobblestone street lined with brick warehouses and warm gas lamps, passing a rider on a pale horse near a GBL sign. As the character mounts a horse, the view shifts to a steady follow behind the animal as it traverses a wider street marked by tram tracks and the prominent SCHIFF building. The perspective then climbs to an elevated wooden balcony, gliding past decorative string lights and the Saint Denis Market sign for an overhead view of the city. Finally, the camera descends stone stairs into a narrow covered alley, where the open street gives way to an enclosed market space filled with textile stalls and wooden barrels under a warm glow.
